terminal_start_instructions.command_pattern: Pick tasks by execution_order ascending, implement in small batches, and update status + KPI evidence after each task.

hard_guardrails: Do NOT implement task logic in projects/observability-kanban unless task explicitly says UI/kanban.
For intelligence pipeline, observability, memory, advisory, pulse, and onboarding tasks: modify only vibeship-spark-intelligence.
For spawner bridge tasks only: modify only spawner-ui.
Always echo selected repo path before coding and verify with git rev-parse --show-toplevel.

recommended_terminal_prompt_prefix: You are implementing Spark Intelligence tasks. Use execution_context.target_repo_path for each task. If task target_repo is spark-intelligence, never implement in observability-kanban UI files. State chosen repo path before coding.
